title: leonia borealis
side_effects: Leonia borealis can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive consumption leading to nausea, dizziness, and stomach ulcers. In severe cases, it can cause respiratory problems, including difficulty breathing and bronchial spasms. Prolonged use of the plant's extracts can also lead to allergic reactions, including skin rashes, itching, and swelling. If not prepared correctly, Leonia borealis can even interact with other medications, exacerbating existing health conditions.
